summary: Completed testing of DB Optimization feature (Optimizare DB). All backend APIs working correctly (17/17 tests passed). Frontend UI verified - sidebar dropdown, navigation, stats cards, index lists, and collection details all working. Fixed minor React key warning.

backend_api: GET /api/admin/db/stats - contains collections array with structure
GET /api/admin/db/stats - contains recommendations array with structure
GET /api/admin/db/stats - contains missing_indexes and total_recommended counts
POST /api/admin/db/create-all-indexes - response has details array with status per index
POST /api/admin/db/create-index - creates single index with valid name
POST /api/admin/db/create-index - returns error for missing index_name
POST /api/admin/db/create-index - returns error for unknown index name
Health score is 100% after creating all indexes
Missing indexes count is 0 after creating all indexes
frontend_ui: Admin sidebar: 'Baza de Date' dropdown visible with Database icon
Admin sidebar: Dropdown expands to show 'Sincronizare' and 'Optimizare DB' sub-items
Admin sidebar: Click on Sincronizare navigates to /admin/sync
Admin sidebar: Click on Optimizare DB navigates to /admin/db-optimize
Admin sidebar: Baza de Date dropdown highlighted when on DB pages
Admin sidebar: Optimizare DB sub-item highlighted when active
DB Optimize page: Title 'Optimizare Baza de Date' displayed
DB Optimize page: 4 stats cards (Scor Sanatate, Date Totale, Indexuri, Indexuri Lipsa)
DB Optimize page: Health score shows 100% (all indexes created)
DB Optimize page: Indexuri Active section shows 12 active indexes with green checkmarks
DB Optimize page: Each index shows collection.name, reason, and keys
DB Optimize page: Detalii Colectii section with expandable collections
DB Optimize page: Firme collection shows 2,381,831 docs, 4558.5 MB, 11 indexes
DB Optimize page: Collection expansion shows index details (name, keys, unique flag)

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: React key warning for duplicate index names (cui_1 on dosare and bpi_records) - changed key from rec.name to ${rec.collection}.${rec.name}
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing database
context_for_next_testing_agent: DB Optimization feature fully implemented and tested. Admin sidebar has 'Baza de Date' dropdown with 'Sincronizare' and 'Optimizare DB' sub-items. DB Optimize page at /admin/db-optimize shows health score, stats cards, recommended indexes (12 total), and expandable collection details. All indexes have been created so health score is 100%. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_db_optimize.py
